CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

S. Patrick Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Peitro and Peitro, a California general partnership.
Charles Pietro, managing partner for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Geoffrey Cooper and Geoffrey Scott Group Incorporated, a California corporation, dba Geoffrey Scott and G Bop.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 6, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 31, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Pietro and Pietro, a California general partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendants Geoffrey Cooper and Geoffrey Scott Group Incorported, a California corporation, dba Geoffrey Scott and G Bop as follows:

Damages/Principal - $417,189.20.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $3,600.00.
Costs - $718.38, for a total judgment in the amount of $421,507.58.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
